what: Define ProjectRepository and PathValidation ports with exact method contracts needed by project commands and queries, including deterministic return and error semantics.

where.description: Add repository interface with methods for create/read/list/select/archive/restore operations.
Add path validation interface used by create/select flows.
Add contract tests with in-memory fakes proving port behavior assumptions.

acceptance.given: An in-memory repository fake implementing all required methods
acceptance.when: Application tests execute create and list operations
acceptance.then: Contracts are sufficient to complete use-cases without hidden infra dependencies.

acceptance.given: A fake path validator returning invalid for a path
acceptance.then: Use-case receives explicit invalid result and does not continue mutation path.

patterns.name: Ports and Adapters
patterns.reference: ARCHITECTURE.md -> section 2, ports declared inside domain/application

patterns.name: CQRS Preparation
patterns.reference: ARCHITECTURE.md -> section 4, command/query handlers depend on ports

context: Stable port contracts prevent leaking infrastructure assumptions into core logic and enable test-first implementation.
technicalNotes: Return typed outcomes rather than implicit null/undefined branches. Merge-safe: add interfaces and tests only, no infra classes yet. Models: Codex gpt-5.1-codex (low), Claude Haiku 4.5 (low).
